name: Shrimp Bisque
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds shrimp, peeled, deveined and headquartered
4 green onions, greens separated from whites
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, headquarter, and devein the shrimp. Reserve the shells and heads.
2. Wash and prepare all vegetables, reserving peels and trimming as needed.
3. Add reserved shrimp scraps and vegetable peels to a 4-quart pot of cold water. Bring to a slow boil over medium-high heat.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes, then strain and reserve the liquid.
5. Finely mince the remaining vegetables and parsley.
6. Melt butter in the pot. Add minced vegetables (excluding green onions) and shrimp. Saute until shrimp are pink.
7. Gradually add flour to the mixture, reducing heat and stirring for about 5 minutes.
8. Incorporate reserved shrimp stock and remaining ingredients except green onions and half and half. Cook over medium heat for 30 minutes.
9. Add green onions and half and half. Adjust seasoning as desired by adding more half and half if needed.
